title: George festival 2025 officially launched – “game on, George!”
description: BUSINESS NEWS - A celebration for the entire...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - A celebration for the entire Garden Route – Mossel Bay, Oudtshoorn, Knysna, Plettenberg Bay and Riversdale, this one’s for you too!


> The George Festival 2025 has officially been launched — and the Garden Route is gearing up for four unforgettable days of culture, art, sport and community celebration from 13 to 16 December.


Unveiled at a vibrant event hosted at the George Museum, the festival promises to transform George into a hub of creativity and excitement.

Presented by the George Municipality in partnership with the Western Cape Department of Cultural Affairs and Sport (DCAS), this year’s festival embraces the theme: Culture. Art. Sport. Our community. Our celebration.

Executive Mayor Alderman Jackie von Brandis described the festival as a showcase of George’s heart and spirit, while MEC Ricardo Mackenzie highlighted the festival’s role in creating unity, opportunity and community pride. The programme reveal, live performances and sponsor recognitions signalled the beginning of what will be one of the region’s most anticipated annual events.


## A Festival Powered by Partnership


Thanks to generous sponsor support and regional collaboration, George Festival 2025 promises world-class experiences for residents and visitors.

Key contributors include MTN, Heineken Beverages, SportPesa, Knox Hydrate, SCAVA, ATKV, MTB Hillbillies, George Trails (GTR), Home of Golf Africa, GJMA, George Naturally, the Garden Route Botanical Garden Trust, the Eden Sport Council, and the Garden Route District Municipality.


## Four Days of Festivities Across the City


With events staged across Unity Park, the Garden Route Botanical Gardens, Thembalethu, Rosemoor, Pacaltsdorp, and the George Museum, festival-goers can look forward to:

- Saturday, 13 December – Sport takes centre stage with 5-a-side soccer, Indigenous Games, Touch Rugby, Netball and Table Tennis tournaments, followed by the much-loved Annual Lights Festival at Unity Park.
- Sunday, 14 December – The energetic George Street Mile, the George Trails/GTR Trail Run, and an uplifting Gospel Festival.
- Monday, 15 December – The cultural Long Table Literary and Arts Experience, a lively Kiddies Fun Zone, Bowls for the Blind, and the Louis Massyn Fun Run.
- Tuesday, 16 December – Grand sporting finals, Chess and Dominoes, the MTB Hillbillies Dam Dash, GTR Cross Hike, and the soulful Jazz Summer Festival in Pacaltsdorp.

Whether you’re from Mossel Bay, Oudtshoorn, Knysna, Plettenberg Bay, or Riversdale, the George Festival 2025 invites you to join in the fun.

Bring your family, your energy and your festive spirit — there’s something for every age, every interest, every community.

As MMC Melvin Roelfse for Community Services, George Municipality shared, “This festival is a reflection of who we are — connected, proud, and full of joy. Let’s celebrate together.”


## Be Part of the Celebration


Explore the full line-up of events, activities, and entertainment by accessing the programme via the link: www.george.gov.za

Follow the official George Municipality and WC DCAS social media channels for updates.

George Festival 2025 – Culture. Art. Sport.

Our community. Our celebration.

As MMC Melvin Roelfse for Community Services, George Municipality shared, “This festival is a reflection of who we are — connected, proud, and full of joy. Let’s celebrate together.”

Bring your family, your energy and your festive spirit — there’s something for every age, every interest, every community.


> The Garden Route’s summer starts here — see you in George!


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
